item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I really like the idea of this, kinda mind boggling too. Take my +1!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Maybe it's the Humes?

That's usually a big turn-off for me, yea. I think I would have enjoyed this more without those bits, as they have a habit of stretching disbelief unnecessarily.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I'm a little baffled as to why this one was in the negatives. Maybe it's the Humes? Either way, I quite liked it overall. It's a fun take on the classic locked room mystery. Reminds me of that episode where the plane lands with no people on it, and after someone finally gets the guts to point out that the scenario is impossible, the plane promptly disappears.

item.title: Author Post
item.content:encoded:
I came to this place to write tales, and somehow I ended up here instead!

Entry for day one of the 72 Hour Jam Contest. Thanks to Boris and Stallmantic on IRC for looking this over. More later, maybe.
